text: A person holding a driver’s license under this chapter is not required to obtain a license for the operation of a motor vehicle from another state authority or department.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 521. Driver's Licenses & Certificates
##### § 521.031 — License from Other Authority

A person holding a driver’s license under this chapter is not required to obtain a license for the operation of a motor vehicle from another state authority or department.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: A person holding a driver’s license under this chapter is not required to obtain a license for the operation of a motor vehicle from another state authority or department.
